completed_work: Recorded require_admission and max_warning_admissions in latest-context manifests.
Rendered admission policy in context-pack Markdown.
Verified with full pytest suite: 186 passed.
key_decisions: Record admission policy separately from admission_summary so the manifest shows both the settings and the outcome.
Keep admission_policy optional for backward compatibility.
next_actions: Run an admission-gated provider comparison with --max-warning-admissions 1 to decide whether this should become the default for provider latest-context commands.
risks: Admission policy is recorded but not yet used to automatically choose defaults; callers still decide cap values.
summary_text: AI-Lab implemented admission-policy manifest recording. ContextPackManifest now has optional admission_policy metadata with schema validation. The policy records require_admission and, when set, max_warning_admissions. context_pack_builder.py now attaches this policy to latest-context manifests, and context_pack_renderer.py renders it in prompt-ready context Markdown. Tests cover schema validation, serialization, builder policy computation, and renderer output. The full suite passed with 186 tests. This makes admission-gated context auditable by showing both the policy settings and resulting admission_summary telemetry in the manifest and rendered context.
